title: Lume rock
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Rock}}
'''Lume rocks''' were very unusual rocks that gave off heat and light, but that did not burn enough to scold an individual's hand.

[[B'omarr Order/Legends|B'omarr Monks]] used them to line pathways for their young to walk over, giving them the confidence that they could walk over a bed of hot colds. Though deceptive, this technique helped filter out monks and gave those that succeeded a much greater sense of accomplishment.

==Appearances==
*''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Brain Spiders]]''
